# Transcrição: The_Importance_of_Staying_True_to_Yourself

- **Fonte:** The_Importance_of_Staying_True_to_Yourself
- **Duração:** 02:12
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 02:12]

Something has been on my mind for a very long time. I want to share with you some unfiltered thoughts. I believe what I'm about to share with you impacts you as much as it impacts me. I find that as human beings we allow other people to tell us who we should be. We try to please everyone and then as a result of this we lose who we are in the process. It all doesn't make sense to me because when you try to please everyone you end up pleasing no one. Guess what? That means that nobody wins. Everyone loses in that scenario. I've been journaling about this for so long, especially as a creator. There are so many voices, millions of voices. And in my life today it doesn't matter what I say or what I create, there are thousands of voices who will disagree with me. And that's become a part of my current reality. And there was a poem that I wrote that I really want to share with you. Why don't we change the lighting team? You follow me because of my authenticity. But then all of a sudden you tell me how to be. A symphony of comments each with their plea. And if I become who you want me to be then I'm no longer me. So why would you follow me once I've lost my identity? Tell you what, I'll keep being me unfiltered and free. My wish for you is that you find the courage to do that too.
